title: Partition List
description: Partition a linked list so nodes less than x appear before those greater than or equal to x.

content.text: Partition a linked list so nodes less than x appear before those greater than or equal to x.

Write code to partition a linked list around a value x, such that all nodes less than x come before all nodes greater than or equal to x. If x is contained within the list, the values of x only need to appear after elements less than x. Build two temporary sub-lists (less / greater-or-equal), preserve relative order, then reconnect and terminate the tail safely.
